name: myblog
description: 个人博客 - 基于 VitePress 构建

scripts.deploy: vitepress build docs && cd docs/.vitepress/dist && git init && git config user.name underrated0030 && git config user.email underrated0030@users.noreply.github.com && git add -A && git commit -m deploy && git push -f https://github.com/underrated0030/MyBlog.git HEAD:gh-pages
